nodes.context: One of two criminal organizations controlling Galveston underworld until mid-1920s, led by Ollie Quinn and Dutch Voight.
Criminal organization led by Sam and Rosario Maceo, successors to Ollie Quinn's operation in Galveston.

edges.context: Ollie Quinn mentored and partnered with Sam and Rosario Maceo, who later took over the Galveston underworld.
